questionHtml: Describe how the structures of LDPE and HDPE affect one mechanical property of the plastics.
markschemeHtml:
branching in LDPE prevents close packing «of chains»

LDPE is more flexible/less rigid

OR

LDPE has lower «tensile» strength

Do not accept “difference in density”.

Award [1 max] for stating “branching in LDPE AND little/no branching in HDPE”.

meta.title: Describe how the structures of LDPE and HDPE affect one mechanical property of the plastics.
